Hero.title: India and Oman, thoughtfully planned around you.
Hero.subtitle: Bespoke journeys shaped with thoughtful stays, seamless logistics, and the quiet details that make every day feel personal.

AboutReiseria.title: About Reiseria
AboutReiseria.paragraph: Reiseria creates beautifully planned journeys through India [[tajMahal]] and Oman [[oman]] for travelers who want culture, comfort, and a sense of discovery in every day. From India's icons and living traditions to Kerala [[kerela]] slow waterways and Oman's dramatic coastlines — we shape trips with thoughtful stays, smooth logistics, and details that feel personal from the first idea to the final return.

DestinationCards.title: Plan your adventure your way
DestinationCards.subtitle: Choose a journey by destination, travel style, or the time of year you want to go. Each path is a starting point for a trip designed around you.
DestinationCards.familyAlt: A family enjoying a travel adventure

ParallaxScroll.title: Travel shaped around the moments worth slowing down for.
ParallaxScroll.subtitle: From quiet waterways and desert light to heritage stays, local tables, and smooth transfers, Reiseria designs India and Oman journeys with an eye for rhythm, comfort, and detail.
ParallaxScroll.augustAlt: Lush India travel scene in August
ParallaxScroll.omanMosqueAlt: A grand mosque and mountain view in Oman

WhyReiseria.title: Why book with Reiseria?
WhyReiseria.card1Desc: We promise we'll care about your trip as much as you do. A dedicated travel consultant will listen, guide and create a trip that could only be yours.
WhyReiseria.card2Desc: From seamless logistics to unexpected discoveries, our deep destination specialism means travel that feels effortless and richer than you could plan for alone.
WhyReiseria.card3Desc: We guarantee that you'll have our support every step of the way. We never pass the buck or fail to take responsibility. We'll be there whenever you need us.
WhyReiseria.card4Desc: Transfers, tickets and check-ins verified so your trip runs like clockwork. Plus, we create your totally tailored trip bible, so every detail is in your hand, at all times.

ItineraryPreview.title: Signature itineraries across India and Oman
ItineraryPreview.subtitle: Explore private journeys that bring together landmark stays, seamless logistics, expert local guidance, and time to experience each destination properly.
ItineraryPreview.itinerary1Summary: Experience India's most iconic journey through royal palaces, vibrant bazaars, luxury heritage stays, and the timeless beauty of the Taj Mahal.
ItineraryPreview.itinerary2Destinations: Muscat / Wadi Shab / Wahiba Sands / Jebel Akhdar
ItineraryPreview.itinerary2Summary: Discover Oman's dramatic mountains, turquoise wadis, luxury desert camps, and stunning coastline in one seamless premium escape.
ItineraryPreview.itinerary2Img0Alt: A grand mosque and mountain view in Oman
ItineraryPreview.itinerary3Destinations: Delhi / Taj Mahal / Udaipur / Muscat / Wahiba Sands
ItineraryPreview.itinerary3Summary: A premium dual-country journey blending India's royal heritage with Oman's untouched luxury landscapes and desert experiences.

HowItWorks.title: From first spark to flawless travel
HowItWorks.subtitle: A calm, expert-led planning process for private journeys that feel considered from the first conversation to the final day away.
HowItWorks.step1Desc: Browse our curated journeys. Let India's wonders spark your imagination. No pressure, just discovery.
HowItWorks.step2Desc: Share your vision. Your dedicated expert crafts a bespoke proposal, built entirely around you.
HowItWorks.step3Desc: Refine every detail. Change hotels, add experiences, adjust pacing. We revise until it feels perfect.
HowItWorks.step4Desc: Book with confidence. We're with you 24/7, before, during, and after your extraordinary journey.

TrustSection.title: Why travelers trust Reiseria
TrustSection.subtitle: We listen closely, shape every route around your pace, and handle the quiet details that make India and Oman feel effortless to experience.
TrustSection.readyToPlan: Ready to plan something personal? Tell us where you want to go, and we will shape the first version of your journey.
TrustSection.review1Quote: We wanted India to feel immersive but not overwhelming, and Reiseria got that balance perfectly. The pacing, guides, and hotels all felt chosen for us.
TrustSection.review2Quote: Oman was seamless from the first airport pickup to the desert camp. Every handoff was calm, polished, and exactly on time.
TrustSection.review2Route: Muscat, Wahiba Sands and Jebel Akhdar
TrustSection.review3Quote: The dual-country itinerary felt ambitious on paper, but it unfolded beautifully. Reiseria made India and Oman feel connected, not rushed.
TrustSection.review4Quote: As a solo traveller I felt looked after without feeling managed. The local guides were excellent, and the plan still left room to wander.
TrustSection.review5Quote: The proposal was thoughtful from day one. They understood the pace we wanted and turned a complicated family trip into something easy.

FinalCta.title: Ready to Explore?
FinalCta.subtitle: Handpicked destinations, thoughtful routes, and calm guidance from first idea to final itinerary.

Footer.tagline: Thoughtful journeys across India and Oman, planned with calm guidance, precise logistics, and a little room for wonder.
Footer.newsletterSuccess: Thanks. We'll send the good stuff, not the noisy stuff.
Footer.footerTagline: Private travel planning for intentional journeys.
